location: Looted from a corpse beneath a burning pile at the center of a ring of Celebrants (dancing villager-type enemies) at East Windmill Pasture, alongside pieces of the Noble's Set armor.
region: Altus Plateau (north, near a large windmill)

source.name: Burning corpse pile, East Windmill Pasture

tactics: Head to East Windmill Pasture in northern Altus Plateau, near a large windmill and run-down shack
Clear the ring of Celebrants and Burning Putrid Corpses around the bonfire — pull them a few at a time or use AoE
Loot the corpse at the center of the burning pile for the Twinned Knight Swords
No boss fight is involved — this is a field/enemy-camp pickup, not a remembrance reward
lore: Its flavor text frames it as belonging to a knight who valued formal, one-on-one dueling tradition — yet paradoxically it's built to be swung two-handed in a wide spinning flurry rather than used elegantly one-handed, a small contradiction between the 'civilized' ideal it represents and how brutally it actually fights.

builds.name: Strength-primary
builds.why: D-to-C Strength scaling with weaker E-to-D Dexterity — dump points into Strength, meet the Dex requirement and stop

builds.name: Heavy-infused pure Strength
builds.why: Maximizes the stronger scaling stat for a two-handed spin-flurry playstyle
